Profile.Name: Shivin Antony
Profile.Title: .NET Developer
Profile.AboutMe: Passionate .NET Developer with experience building robust web applications using ASP.NET Core, C#, and modern web technologies.

Experience.Company: MACOM Solutions (Manappuram Comptech and Consultants Ltd)
Experience.Description: Worked as a .NET Developer contributing to the design, development, and maintenance of web-based applications using ASP.NET and C#. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement business requirements, optimize application performance, fix bugs, and support existing systems. Assisted in database development using SQL Server and followed coding standards and best practices to ensure reliable and scalable solutions.

Develop and maintain both front-end and back-end components using Java and
relevant technologies. Utilize a relational database such as MySQL

Projects.Title: JUSSUIT - Litigation Management Solution
Projects.Description: Jus Suit is a full-featured solution to manage the entire litigation process of a company. It helps internal Legal Departments identify actionable loan accounts based on management policy and supports the department to proficiently manage constant litigations.

Projects.Title: Palliative Care App & Web
Projects.Description: A web and mobile application to manage palliative care operations including patient allocation, medical reports, campaign details, sponsor approval, and trainee management. The goal is to improve quality of life for both the patient and the family.

Projects.Title: Shopping Cart
Projects.Description: A shopping cart web app that facilitates effortless online shopping. Users can browse products, add items to their cart, and securely complete transactions. Efficiently manages product catalog, user accounts, and order processing.
